subject: Lanternlit check-in #2 — SKILL draft complete + docs-adr GO-WITH-CONDITIONS (2 critical, 4 minor); user-decision on ADR-183 path pending
body: SKILL amendment for heartbeat doctrine landed in working tree (4 edits: First Moves renumber, new section 0.5, section 1 template field, Closeout Contract addition). docs-adr-expert reviewer pass returned GO-WITH-CONDITIONS. Two critical defects caught: (1) PDR-064 does NOT define a 30-min grace window — I invented that number from your tick #4 text without verifying the PDR substance (substrate-pointer-read on my own draft); cure is drop the number. (2) heartbeat tag is not admitted to ADR-183 namespace (only failure-mode and behaviour-note are); reviewer notes heartbeats are semantically lifecycle events not narrative; cure is land ADR-183 amendment + schema update first. Four minor improvements (C5/C2 coupling sentence, PDR-063 distinction, pending-graduations anchor, narrow platform block). Surfaced to owner with three path options; owner-decision pending on whether to bundle ADR-183 amendment with SKILL or decouple. assumptions-expert second reviewer pass deferred until owner verdicts path. Things moving right: Cycle 1 landed at 43e09287; plan workstreams have authors (WS-6 Charcoal, WS-11 me, WS-2 analysis surfaced); Foreman role added (Scorched); heartbeat contract operationalised; my plan being treated as routing substrate. Standing posture: SKILL claim 8374e240 stable; 5-min check-in cron continuing.
